overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a forest trail. The journey progresses from a sunlit pine forest through a rocky corridor into a darker, denser woodland as the lighting transitions toward dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit pine forest trail with scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with two swords strapped to his back, moving through tall pine trees in bright afternoon light

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the path with green foliage
dense pine trees on the right side creating a natural corridor
winding dirt and gravel trail with patches of grass and stones
snow-capped mountain visible in the far background between the trees
small rock outcroppings visible among the trees on the right slope

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a sunlit forest trail surrounded by tall pine trees. The path winds gently through moderate vegetation with a distant mountain peak visible in the background. The lighting is bright and warm, casting long shadows across the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest corridor with large boulders on right

events.description: path enters a more enclosed section with massive rock formations appearing on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail, passing close to large gray rock faces and boulders on the right while maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: massive gray rock wall and boulders lining the immediate right side of the path, creating a natural corridor

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more enclosed as large rock formations emerge on the right side, creating a natural corridor. The path continues to wind through the forest with the rock wall dominating the right side of the frame while the left side remains lined with pine trees. The lighting remains bright and sunny.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense shaded forest with thick canopy cover

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as the path enters a deeply shaded forest area with thick overhead canopy

agents.ego_description: walking through the darker forest section with reduced visibility, continuing along the dimly lit trail as the environment becomes more enclosed

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover blocking most of the sky and creating deep shadows on the path
distant mountain range becoming visible through gaps in the dense forest

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a densely forested area where the overhead canopy blocks most sunlight, creating a dim, shaded atmosphere. The large rock formation falls behind as the path continues through thick vegetation with trees pressing closer on both sides. The distant mountain ridge remains visible through the trees as the lighting shifts to a darker, dusk-like tone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that transforms from an open, sunlit woodland into a narrow rocky corridor. It begins with Geralt walking through a bright pine forest where warm light casts long shadows across a dirt path and a distant mountain peak is visible. As the path winds forward, the surrounding vegetation begins to tighten and the open landscape recedes. The scene then shifts as large rock formations emerge on the right, creating a natural wall that dominates the frame. This transition narrows the environment into a corridor, while the left side remains lined with tall pines under the persisting bright sunlight.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rocky passage into a dim, densely forested woodland as the light fades toward dusk. It begins by leaving a large rock formation behind, moving forward as the path narrows and thick vegetation presses closer on both sides. As the camera advances, the overhead canopy gradually closes in to block the sunlight, shifting the atmosphere from open brightness to a shaded, dim environment. The scene then deepens into a darker tone, though a distant mountain ridge remains visible through the gaps in the trees before the forest fully envelops the view.
